heading: Reporting requirements
label: 20308 Reporting requirements
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in subsec. (a)(2)(C), is , , , known as the Uniformed and Overseas Citizens Absentee Voting Act, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 99–410100 Stat. 924Aug. 28, 1986

children.heading: Report on status of implementation and assessment of programs
children.label: a Report on status of implementation and assessment of programs

children.text: The status of the implementation of the procedures established for the collection and delivery of marked absentee ballots of absent overseas uniformed services voters under , and a detailed description of the specific steps taken towards such implementation for the regularly scheduled general election for Federal office held in November 2010.section 20304 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: A thorough and complete assessment of whether the Program, as configured and implemented as of , is effectively assisting absent uniformed services voters in exercising their right to vote.October 28, 2009

children.label: B
children.text: An inventory and explanation of any areas of voter assistance in which the Program has failed to accomplish its stated objectives and effectively assist absent uniformed services voters in exercising their right to vote.

children.label: C
children.text: As necessary, a detailed plan for the implementation of any new program to replace or supplement voter assistance activities required to be performed under this Act.
A detailed description of the specific steps taken towards the implementation of voter registration assistance for absent uniformed services voters under .section 1566a of title 10

children.heading: Biennial report on effectiveness of activities and utilization of certain procedures
children.label: b Biennial report on effectiveness of activities and utilization of certain procedures

children.text: An assessment of the effectiveness of activities carried out under , including the activities and actions of the Federal Voting Assistance Program of the Department of Defense, a separate assessment of voter registration and participation by absent uniformed services voters, a separate assessment of voter registration and participation by overseas voters who are not members of the uniformed services, and a description of the cooperation between States and the Federal Government in carrying out such section.section 20305 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: A description of the specific programs implemented by each military department of the Armed Forces pursuant to such section.

children.label: B
children.text: The number of absent uniformed services voters who utilized voter registration assistance provided under such section.

A description of the utilization of the procedures for the collection and delivery of marked absentee ballots established pursuant to , which shall include the number of marked absentee ballots collected and delivered under such procedures and the number of such ballots which were not delivered by the time of the closing of the polls on the date of the election (and the reasons such ballots were not so delivered).section 20304 of this title

children.heading: Absent overseas uniformed services voter
children.label: 1 Absent overseas uniformed services voter
children.text: The term “absent overseas uniformed services voter” has the meaning given such term in .section 20304(d) of this title

children.heading: Presidential designee
children.label: 2 Presidential designee
children.text: The term “Presidential designee” means the Presidential designee under .section 20301(a) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the Committees on Appropriations, Armed Services, and Rules and Administration of the Senate; and

children.label: B
children.text: the Committees on Appropriations, Armed Services, and House Administration of the House of Representatives.
